subject: Alpha Metals (SUP-001) Expedited Shipping Offer
body: Hi YamaTech Procurement, this is Steven from Alpha Metals. We noticed you might be running low on Microcontroller V2 due to recent market constraints. We can offer an expedited shipment of up to 2000 units if you send over a Purchase Order today by replying to this email.

subject: URGENT: VIP Client NexGen Robotics Order
body: URGENT: VIP Client 'NexGen Robotics' just requested 500 units of SKU-C to be delivered ASAP. Please confirm if we can fulfill this and procure any necessary raw materials immediately to unblock production.

subject: Incident Report: Destroyed Raw Materials
body: Incident Report: A forklift accident just destroyed 500 units of RAW-001 (Microcontroller V2). We need to write this off and replenish stock immediately, otherwise production for SKU-C and SKU-A will halt.
